title: Create: Cobblemon
description: Industrial Pokémon automation with Create and Cobblemon, all in one modpack.
body: Create: Cobblemon Industrialized is a modpack that brings together the automation magic of the Create mod and the monster-catching world of Cobblemon. Build factories to automate Pokéball crafting, potion brewing, EXP candy production, and more. All seamlessly integrated with Cobblemon’s gameplay. Whether you're processing apricorns, crushing ores, or designing with new decorative blocks, this pack lets you industrialize your Pokémon journey without losing the charm of either mod.
